subject: [PATCH 4/6] nfsd: fix dentry ref leak on V4ROOT export filehandle lookup

2026-05-31.patch_summary: This patch fixes a memory leak in the NFSv3 filehandle handling code. When a V4ROOT export's fsid is targeted, the dentry reference is not properly released, leading to a memory leak on every request. The patch adds a call to dput(dentry) when NFSEXP_V4ROOT is detected, ensuring that the reference count is correctly updated.
